text: A 30× BCE-weight increase (0.1 to 3.0) gave essentially identical BCE: agent 1 dir_bce_back 1.1193 vs 1.1215, Δ=0.002.

locator.quote: multiplying every gradient by 30× scales m and sqrt(v) by 30×

text: Adam's update lr×m/sqrt(v) is scale-invariant in gradient magnitude: multiplying every gradient by 30× scales m and sqrt(v) by 30× each, leaving m/sqrt(v) unchanged.

locator.quote: don't expect aux-loss weight to drive convergence

text: Lesson: don't expect aux-loss weight to drive convergence speed under Adam — weight sets the BCE-vs-PPO trade-off direction, not the magnitude of progress.
